name: Farm to Sea
description: Farm to Sea is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pacific Beach, WA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Highland Park
description: Highland Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cosmopolis, WA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Kucera Park
description: Kucera Park is a place to play pickleball in Seabrook, WA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court cannot be reserved. The court is private.
open_play_schedule: Open to Seabrook homeowners and rental home guests

name: YMCA of Grays Harbor
description: YMCA of Grays Harbor is a place to play pickleball in Hoquiam, WA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
